docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-24-2021 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER MEGAN POWERS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
